memoryArtifacts.headline: Arme dei Malaspina - spino fiorito
memoryArtifacts.description: L'aquila bicipite nera nello stemma, che simboleggia il Sacro Romano impero, venne concessa dall'Imperatore Federico II per il quale i capostipiti della casata Corrado ed Obizo Malaspina combatterono.

sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: Corrado Malaspina - Published information: male

zh.Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Roma: 義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉
zh.Correggio, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Ital: 義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Corrado Malaspina於1180年出生在義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉時，他的父親Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina40歲，母親Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina35歲。他於1220年與Costanza Hohenstaufen結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1254年7月7日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Roma: 意大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉
zh-hans.Correggio, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Ital: 意大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Corrado Malaspina于1180年出生在意大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉时，他的父亲Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina40岁，母亲Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina35岁。他于1220年与Costanza Hohenstaufen结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1254年7月7日在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malaspina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Tino, Aldo, Antonio, Carmella, Guido, Mario.
from mala (feminine of malo) ‘bad, evil’ + spina ‘thorn’, applied as a nickname and personal name.

variants.name: La Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Mario, Rosario, Sebastiano, Carmelo, Gino, Giuseppe, Ignazio, Javier, Orazio, Salvatore.

from spina ‘thorn’ (from Latin spina), with the definite article la, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or in an area of scrubland, or (in a transferred sense) for someone who lived by the crest or ridge of a hill. It could also be a nickname for a tall, thin, spiky person.

variants.name: Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Ciro, Antonio, Carmine, Angelo, Rocco, Vito, Carlo, Carmela, Santo, Vincenza, Vincenzo.

from spina ‘thorn, thorn bush’, used as a nickname in various senses, including ‘distress, sorrow’ (alluding to Christ's crown of thorns), and also as a personal name; or alternatively a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word (in some instances with reference to the dedication of a shrine).

nameMeanings.name: Corrado
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: This was a common name in several of the Italian royal houses during the Middle Ages. See Conrad .

en.lifeSummary: When Corrado Malaspina was born in 1180, in Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italy, his father, Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina, was 40 and his mother, Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina, was 35. He married Costanza Hohenstaufen in 1220. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 7 July 1254, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Corrado Malaspina est né en 1180, à Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italie, son père, Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Costanza Hohenstaufen en 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 7 juillet 1254, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Corrado Malaspina 1180 in Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina 40 und seine Mutter Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina 35. Er hat 1220 Costanza Hohenstaufen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 7. Juli 1254 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Corrado Malaspina è nato il nel 1180 nel Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italia, il suo padre, Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Costanza Hohenstaufen nel 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 7 luglio 1254, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Corrado Malaspinaが1180年にイタリアエミリア-ロマグナフエララフエララコレグジオで生まれた時，父Marchese Obizzo II Malaspinaは40歳，母Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspinaは35歳であった。1220年にCostanza Hohenstaufenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1254年7月7日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Corrado Malaspina(이)가 1180년 이탈리아 에미리아-로마그나 페라라 페라라 코레조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1220년 Costanza Hohenstaufen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1254년 7월 7일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Corrado Malaspina nasceu em 1180, em Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Itália, seu pai, Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Costanza Hohenstaufen em 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 7 de julho de 1254, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Corrado Malaspina родился в 1180 г. в местности коррегио, фиррара, фиррара, эмеля-ромагна, Италия, его отцу по имени Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Costanza Hohenstaufen в 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер около 7 июля 1254 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Corrado Malaspina nació en 1180, en Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italia, su papá, Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Costanza Hohenstaufen en 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 7 de julio de 1254, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
